prompt: Create an ultra-wide cinematic mobile game cut-in banner in a dramatic fantasy anime-realism style. Canvas is a very wide horizontal rectangle, about 21:9, framed with thick black letterbox bars above and below the action area for a movie-like special attack screen. The subject is a heroic brown tabby cat, close-up from the shoulders up, positioned mostly on the left half and facing right with intense large green eyes, detailed fur, long white whiskers, and a determined expression. The cat wears a dark olive-green adventurer cloak with folds flowing backward and one visible round bronze clasp near the lower left. The background is a dark starry cosmic battle scene filled with glowing gold shards, sparks, triangular crystal fragments, streaking light trails, and bright white lightning bolts radiating across the right half. Place one large bold Japanese attack phrase across the lower-middle foreground, centered and spanning almost the full width: 星のかけらの力で　空へ！. The typography should be thick, heavy, game-like, pale cream to warm gold gradient with subtle beveling, dark shadow, and a thin horizontal golden line passing behind or through the text, making it feel like a special move title card. Keep the cat partially behind the text so the words dominate the cut-in. Use high contrast, sharp details, dynamic diagonal energy, glittering particles, and a premium fantasy RPG visual style. No extra logos, UI buttons, watermarks, or additional text.
promptEn: Create an ultra-wide cinematic mobile game cut-in banner in a dramatic fantasy anime-realism style. Canvas is a very wide horizontal rectangle, about 21:9, framed with thick black letterbox bars above and below the action area for a movie-like special attack screen. The subject is a heroic brown tabby cat, close-up from the shoulders up, positioned mostly on the left half and facing right with intense large green eyes, detailed fur, long white whiskers, and a determined expression. The cat wears a dark olive-green adventurer cloak with folds flowing backward and one visible round bronze clasp near the lower left. The background is a dark starry cosmic battle scene filled with glowing gold shards, sparks, triangular crystal fragments, streaking light trails, and bright white lightning bolts radiating across the right half. Place one large bold Japanese attack phrase across the lower-middle foreground, centered and spanning almost the full width: 星のかけらの力で　空へ！. The typography should be thick, heavy, game-like, pale cream to warm gold gradient with subtle beveling, dark shadow, and a thin horizontal golden line passing behind or through the text, making it feel like a special move title card. Keep the cat partially behind the text so the words dominate the cut-in. Use high contrast, sharp details, dynamic diagonal energy, glittering particles, and a premium fantasy RPG visual style. No extra logos, UI buttons, watermarks, or additional text.
promptZh: 创作一张采用戏剧性奇幻动漫写实风格的超宽电影级手游特写横幅。画布为极宽的横向矩形，比例约为 21:9，动作区域上下方带有厚实的黑色遮幅，营造出电影般的特殊攻击画面感。主体是一只英雄虎斑猫，采用肩部以上的特写镜头，主要位于左半部分，面朝右侧，拥有深邃的大绿眼睛、细腻的毛发、长长的白胡须和坚定的表情。猫咪身穿深橄榄绿色的冒险家斗篷，斗篷褶皱向后飘动，左下方可见一个圆形的青铜扣。背景是黑暗的星际战斗场景，充斥着发光的金色碎片、火花、三角形水晶残片、流光轨迹以及横跨右半部分的明亮白色闪电。在前景中下部放置一行醒目的大号日文攻击短语，居中并几乎横跨整个宽度：星のかけらの力で　空へ！。字体应厚重、充满游戏感，呈现从浅奶油色到暖金色的渐变，带有微妙的斜面效果、深色阴影，以及一条穿过或位于文字后方的细横向金线，使其看起来像是一张必杀技标题卡。让猫咪部分位于文字后方，使文字在特写中占据主导地位。使用高对比度、锐利的细节、动态的对角线能量、闪烁的粒子以及高级奇幻 RPG 的视觉风格。不要添加额外的徽标、UI 按钮、水印或其他文字。
